title: Custom Manufacturing
shortDescription: Tailored brass component manufacturing to your exact specifications and drawings.
description: Our custom manufacturing service transforms your designs into precision brass components. From concept drawings to production-ready parts, our engineering team works closely with you to optimize designs for manufacturability while maintaining your exact specifications. We handle orders from prototype quantities to high-volume production runs.

title: CNC Precision Machining
shortDescription: State-of-the-art CNC turning and milling for high-precision brass components.
description: Our CNC precision machining facility houses the latest multi-axis turning centers and milling machines capable of producing brass components to tolerances of ±0.01mm. From simple turned parts to complex multi-feature components, our automated production lines ensure consistency and efficiency across production volumes.

title: Surface Finishing
shortDescription: Complete range of surface treatments including plating, polishing, and coating.
description: Our in-house surface finishing department offers a comprehensive range of treatments to enhance the appearance, corrosion resistance, and functional properties of brass components. From bright nickel and chrome plating to specialized coatings, we deliver the finish your application demands.

title: Quality Assurance
shortDescription: Comprehensive quality testing and certification for all brass components.
description: Our ISO-certified quality laboratory provides comprehensive testing and inspection services using calibrated precision instruments. From incoming material verification to final inspection, every component is subjected to rigorous quality checks that guarantee conformance to your specifications and international standards.

title: OEM & Private Label
shortDescription: White-label and OEM manufacturing with your branding and packaging.
description: We offer complete OEM and private label manufacturing services, producing brass components under your brand name with your custom packaging. Our flexible production system accommodates your labeling, packaging, and documentation requirements while maintaining the same high quality standards.

title: Export & Logistics
shortDescription: End-to-end export services with documentation and worldwide shipping.
description: Our dedicated export team handles all aspects of international shipping, from documentation and customs clearance to freight forwarding and delivery tracking. With experience exporting to 30+ countries, we ensure smooth logistics and compliance with international trade regulations.
